mapper.select: SELECT tl.list_id, tl.project_id, tl.name, tl.position, tl.is_default, tl.created_at, COUNT(tk.task_id) AS task_count FROM task_lists tl LEFT JOIN tasks tk ON tl.list_id = tk.list_id WHERE tl.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY tl.list_id, tl.project_id, tl.name, tl.position, tl.is_default, tl.created_at ORDER BY tl.position ASC
